title: 3D Lights
description: A Resource Pack that modifies light emitting blocks to be 3D and cooler looking
body:
# 3D Lights

The 3D Lights Resource Pack modifies some of Minecraft's light emitting blocks to be more impressive looking with a hollowed out glowy 3D interior. This pack works without any mods and does not use internal shaders.

The pack is very lightweight only modifying the following blocks:
- Copper Bulbs
- Redstone Lamps
- Sea Lanterns
- Beacons
- Lanterns (normal and soul)
- Jack o' lanterns and pumpkins

Below are some pictures showcasing what you can do with this Resource Pack
![A diorama of different customized block models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a64beaf0fd180a4efe6d67e0bbe17f942bc868ff.png)
![A scene of a snowy village with the customized lanterns](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35cc9312ef84fce26200bea1984db2b1653d4a3f_0.webp)
